# orientation()

**Instance Method**

Returns the representation’s orientation.

## Declaration

```swift
func orientation() -> ALAssetOrientation
```

## Return Value

The representation’s orientation. For a list of possible values, see [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetOrientation].

## Getting Image Attributes

- **scale()**: Returns the representation’s scale.
- **dimensions()**: Returns the representation’s dimensions.
- **filename()**: Returns a string representing the filename of the representation on disk.

items.description: Returns a string representing the filename of the representation on disk.
